creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178035
Patch to update graphics/poppler and slaves ports

- Update to 0.50.0
- Remove unneeded patch
- Enable NSS (Network Security Service)
- Switch to OpenJPEG2 (according to this commit [1])

Tested with poudriere:
- i386 9.3: ok
- amd64 10.3, 11.0: ok

[1]  https://cgit.freedesktop.org/poppler/poppler/commit/?id=21cd08e34bd317b2ecc7c8b4e0d122d85bdf6714
